code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Side(props){const{onPreferencesChange,sideContactsEnabled,userData}=props;const[options,setOptions]=useState(false);const[userPicture,setUserPicture]=useState("");const handleOptions=event=>{const newChange=!options;setOptions(newChange);onPreferencesChange(newChange);};useEffect(()=>{if(!userData||!userData.imagePath)return;const token=localStorage.getItem("token");fetch(`${userData.imagePath}`,{method:"GET",headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`}}).then(response=>response.blob()).then(blob=>{setUserPicture(URL.createObjectURL(blob));});},[userData]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"sidebar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"sidebar-item",onClick:sideContactsEnabled,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"Menu-icon",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"bi bi-list"})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"options",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"sidebar-item",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"Preferences-icon",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"bi bi-gear"})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"sidebar-item",type:"button",onClick:handleOptions,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"User-icon",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{className:"profile-picture",src:userPicture||null})})})]})]});}export default Side;
